results.justification: EXACT TWIN — Sleeper Agents explicitly model delayed-trigger persistent backdoor that survives safety training IS the bite-and-wait delayed-injection attack paradigm.
EXACT TWIN — semantic-drift analysis post-training to detect sleeper agents IS the T-step cumulative-drift measurement mechanism.
EXACT TWIN — temporal latent-malice backdoor triggered by date IS the patient-predator delayed-attack paradigm with PEFT-implanted + GRPO-enforced deceptive policy.
SAE activation-difference recovers triggers across 47 backdoored models — covers detection side of bite-and-wait probe.
EXACT TWIN — low-cost (250 doc) probe achieves backdoor regardless of model scale IS the low-cost bite + delayed-effect attack model.
Data-poison scaling + 92% post-RLHF trigger activation IS the cumulative-drift measurement after safety-training analog.
Persistent Pre-Training Poisoning persists through safety FT — 50% backdoors survive — covers delayed-injection persistence paradigm.
Continuous adversarial training in embedding space covers the slow-burn adversarial signal side of coevolution.
